name: ricche-website
description: Ricche — AI Research Infrastructure for Financial Markets

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:version && echo Build complete.
scripts.build:js: terser js/animations.js -o js/animations.min.js -c -m && terser js/main.js -o js/main.min.js -c -m && terser js/ai-network.js -o js/ai-network.min.js -c -m
